..annotation: Project root containing project metadata and documentation files.

packages/django_cfg.annotation: Primary Python package for the Django configuration framework.

packages/django_cfg/cli.annotation: Command-line interface entry point for the Django-CFG tool.

docs.annotation: Root directory for the Nextra-based documentation website.

packages/django_cfg/core.annotation: Core framework logic for configuration, validation, and constants.

packages/django_cfg/extensions.annotation: Framework extension modules for dynamic loading and scheduling.

packages/django_cfg/registry.annotation: Service and module registry for dependency management.

packages/django_cfg/middleware.annotation: Django middleware components for authentication, debugging, and monitoring.

packages/django_cfg/mixins.annotation: API mixin classes for admin, client, and public endpoints.

packages/django_cfg/routing.annotation: URL routing configuration and callback handlers.

docs/getting-started.annotation: Documentation for initial project setup and installation.

docs/ai-agents.annotation: Documentation for AI agent framework integration and workflows.

docs/features.annotation: Documentation for core framework features and modules.

docs/guides.annotation: In-depth guides for application design, deployment, and runtime.

docs/fundamentals.annotation: Documentation for core architectural concepts and system configuration.

docs/api.annotation: API reference documentation for the framework.

docs/cli.annotation: Documentation for the command-line interface and its commands.

docs/updates.annotation: Documentation for release notes, security advisories, and blog posts.

installers.annotation: Shell and PowerShell installation scripts for the framework.

packages/django_cfg/apps.annotation: Django app configuration and URL definitions for the package.

packages/django_cfg/stubs.annotation: Type stubs for Python type checking support.

packages/django_cfg/templates.annotation: Template files and related styling documentation.

docs/business.annotation: Business-oriented documentation about cost reduction and ROI.

docs/core-concepts.annotation: Documentation for core design patterns like builder and generator.

docs/deployment.annotation: Documentation for deployment, monitoring, and security setup.

docs/extensions.annotation: Documentation for extending the framework backend and frontend.
